function.name: arifos.init
function.description: Start a governed session and bind the initial telemetry seed. Modes: init, revoke, refresh, state, status.

function.name: arifos.sense
function.description: Time grounding, evidence checks, and reality state verification.

function.name: arifos.mind
function.description: Multi-source synthesis and structured first-principles reasoning.

function.name: arifos.route
function.description: Route request to the correct metabolic lane or tool family.

function.name: arifos.memory
function.description: Retrieve governed memory and engineering context from vector store.

function.name: arifos.heart
function.description: Safety, dignity, and adversarial critique of content or proposals.

function.name: arifos.ops
function.description: Calculate operation costs, thermodynamics, capacity, and timing.

function.name: arifos.judge
function.description: Final constitutional verdict evaluation and hold logic enforcement.

function.name: arifos.vault
function.description: Append immutable verdict record to the Merkle-hashed ledger.

function.name: arifos.forge
function.description: Redirect or dispatch execution tasks to the sovereign VPS executor.
